column1: # Committed source-of-truth (lockfile-style): each cell -> EXPECTED PASS/FAIL under
# the uniform gate (corr>=0.9999 AND sum_ratio in [0.999,1.001]) plus its seed
# corr/sum_ratio. fp32 legitimately misses the gate on precision-heavy cells (large
# N, short lambda, cancellation, the stress geometry). Curved detector: a trailing
# zero-arg -curved_det is now honored, so cov_curved_det_on PASSES; curved_stress
# FAILS on a short-lambda geometry-input precision edge (flux ~0.3% past the gate),
# NOT a curved-detector geometry defect. A verdict FLIP vs this file is the
# regression signal; regenerate deliberately and review the diff, like cells/.
